## Description
Provide a summary of the changes introduced by this pull request, the bug fix or feature accomplished, and the reasoning behind design choices.

## Related Issue
Fixes # (issue number or link)

## Type of Change
Please check the options that are relevant:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Code cleanup / Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the C# and JavaScript/CSS coding styles of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code changes
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in complex or non-obvious areas
- [ ] My changes compile cleanly without any new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have verified that 2D remote/keyboard navigation works cleanly on updated overlays/views
